name: Ultraman Geed
overview: After escaping from the raid of giant monster Skull Gomora, Riku Asakura and his partner Pega stumbled upon a secret base lied 500 m underground. Given the Geed Riser and Ultra Capsules by operating system Rem, he transforms into Ultraman Geed and becomes a hero that his childhood inspired.

trailers.title: News flash! The new program "Ultraman Geed" PV vol.1  ! -Official-
